case_title: NADERI, FRED EXECUTIVE DIRECTION IN. VS ROD, MASON & ANDY POPELL HARVEST TECHNOLOGY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NADERI, FRED EXECUTIVE DIRECTION IN. AS TO DEFENDANT ROD, MASON & ANDY POPELL HARVEST TECHNOLOGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEFENDANT SENT $ 10.00 CHECK FOR CONTINUANCE ? DID NOT COMPLY WITH COURTS RULES RE: CONTINUANCE; PLS.SEE FILE
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADVANCEMENT OF HEARING FRWRDED.TO DEPT. C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-28-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-10-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-10-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-30-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
CON'T REQUEST BY DEFT: DENIED. COPY OF DENIAL SENT TO DEFT. ROD MASON.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NADERI, FRED EXECUTIVE DIRECTION IN. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROD, MASON & ANDY POPELL HARVEST TECHNOLOGY $822.50 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $837.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
